name: 3-bet pot 8h8c3d paired
description: Same paired small board as spot_009 but in a 3-bet pot. Both ranges are heavy on premium broadway + AK, so neither side made much on this board. Tests a 'neither range hits' scenario in a 3-bet pot where positional aggression typically dominates. Hero = BB, villain = BTN.

input.hero_range: TT, JJ, QQ, KK, AA, AJs, AQs, AKs, AQo, AKo, KQs, A5s, A4s, A3s, A2s
input.villain_range: QQ, KK, AA, AKs, AKo, A5s, A4s, KQs

expected_notes: Populated by differential run. Neither range has an 8; overpairs TT/JJ/QQ/KK/AA still have massive equity. BTN typically c-bets very high frequency in this spot.
